name: ai-output-runtime
description: Agent-agnostic skill for AI Output Runtime v0.1: a small Markdown + JSON contract for LLM-generated reports.

scripts.test:valid: node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/valid-v0.1.md && node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/report-demo.md && node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/chart-demo.md && node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/landing.md
scripts.test:invalid: node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/invalid-html.md && exit 1 || exit 0
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:valid && npm run test:invalid
scripts.render:site: node scripts/aio.mjs render examples/landing.md --inline-runtime --lang en --out docs/index.html && node scripts/aio.mjs render examples/report-demo.md --inline-runtime --lang zh-CN --out docs/demo-zh.html && node scripts/aio.mjs render examples/chart-demo.md --inline-runtime --lang en --out docs/demo-charts.html

author: wxkingstar
